text: I feel a sense of curiosity and possibility here. The sterile, brightly-lit corridor outside transitions into a vibrantly colored space filled with words and ideas. It is as if innovation is both enclosed within this glass room and seeping outward, inviting me to reflect on progress and creativity. There’s an energy that feels slightly anticipatory—something important is being shaped here, and I am poised on the edge of witnessing or contributing to it. I feel both small and interconnected, aware that the work of others can ripple outward in ways I cannot yet imagine.
